chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4285 of 2012 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.42672/2012. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.04.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner points out that controversy in this petition has already been addressed by the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Naubahar Bottling Company Pvt.) Limited v. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2022 SCMR 765. He states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
